overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character moves from a narrow graffiti-covered alley into open plazas with a distinctive neon pyramid structure, past towering cyberpunk skyscrapers, and through streets with light vehicle traffic before approaching pedestrians near the pyramid entrance.

events.description: character stands up from crouching position by the wall
begins moving forward along the corridor wall

agents.ego_description: character stands up from crouching by the HPS wall and begins walking along the graffiti-covered corridor

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with yellow and black hazard stripes and HPS graffiti text
large colorful painted mural on the wall surface depicting abstract figures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a character crouching beside a concrete wall marked with HPS graffiti. The character stands and begins walking along the narrow enclosed alley with graffiti murals, moving from shadow toward the open end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza approach with neon pyramid structure

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza with pyramid building visible
moving from shadow of wall into direct morning sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking briskly along the sidewalk toward the open plaza, turning right to face the pyramid structure

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the distant street

entered.detail: large pyramid-shaped structure with green neon structural lines and reflective glass panels
massive cylindrical concrete support column with cables attached
glowing pink and cyan light strips embedded in the pavement

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley into a wide-open plaza bathed in morning sunlight. The distinctive neon-lit pyramid building dominates the right side of the frame, while glowing floor lights guide the path forward. A massive concrete pillar stands in the center distance as the camera turns right to approach the open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic plaza with neon-lit walkways and towering skyscrapers

events.description: slight turn to the left while continuing forward through the plaza
passing through area with dense neon floor lighting patterns

agents.ego_description: moving through the plaza with glowing floor lights, looking up at the towering cyberpunk architecture

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with vertical ribbed lines and neon green signage
tall palm trees lining the plaza walkway

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the expansive plaza, passing glowing neon floor lights that shift from cyan to pink. A massive cyberpunk tower rises on the left with vertical architectural details and green neon accents, while palm trees line the walkway. The pyramid building remains visible to the right as the camera moves forward with a slight left turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with moving traffic and industrial buildings

events.description: large industrial truck passes by on the right side of the street
delivery truck turns at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street, weaving between traffic barriers as industrial vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck with container driving past on the street
delivery truck turning at the intersection

entered.detail: concrete and metal barriers lining the street edge with yellow accents
weathered industrial building with teal-colored metal panels and red structural elements

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the plaza onto a city street with active vehicle traffic. Large industrial trucks pass by on the right while the character navigates around concrete street barriers. The environment shifts to industrial architecture with teal-colored building facades, and the palm trees recede into the distance as the camera progresses along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area in front of neon pyramid with pedestrian activity

events.description: turning back toward the pyramid building entrance
approaching group of pedestrians near the pyramid entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the pyramid structure, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk near the entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in red top walking toward the camera
man looking at his phone while walking

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with neon signage and storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character turns back toward the neon pyramid building, now approaching its entrance from a different angle. The scene becomes more populated with pedestrians walking along the sidewalk. Palm trees line the approach, and commercial buildings with neon signage appear on the left as the camera moves toward the pyramid's glowing green framework.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, graffiti-strewn alleyway into a sprawling, neon-lit futuristic plaza and city street. It begins with a character crouching beside a concrete wall marked with HPS graffiti before standing and walking through the shadows of a narrow corridor toward the light. As the character emerges from the alley, the scene opens into a wide plaza bathed in morning sunlight, where the camera turns right to reveal a massive neon-lit pyramid and glowing floor lights that shift from cyan to pink. The movement then carries the character past a towering cyberpunk skyscraper with green accents and lining palm trees, before shifting onto a busy city street filled with industrial trucks and teal-colored facades. Finally, the camera turns back toward the neon pyramid, navigating past pedestrians and commercial signage to approach the building's glowing green framework.
